# Chapter 3: Heat engines and refrigerators  (~100 pp)
- 3.1 Carnot cycle as the reference (12) · 3.2 Rankine cycle (15) · 3.3 Brayton cycle (15) · 3.4 Otto, Diesel, Atkinson cycles (15) · 3.5 Refrigeration cycles (12) · 3.6 Combined cycles, cogeneration, trigeneration (15) · 3.7 Failure section: efficiency claims that violated the second law (16)

**Archetype**: optimisation, scaling. **Project**: estimate the efficiency of a household car engine three ways; compare to manufacturer claim. **Exercises**: 35.
